name: Pilaf Stuffed Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry onions in 1/4 cup butter in a saucepan until transparent.
2. Add pine nuts and rice; sauté until light brown.
3. Add currants, 1 tablespoon salt, and water with a dash of pepper. Bring to a boil.
4. Cover and simmer for 25 - 30 minutes, or until all the water is cool before using as stuffing.
5. Stuff chicken with one cup of pilaf.
6. Combine yogurt and salt; brush half over the chicken.
7. Bake at 400°F for 15 minutes.
8. Reduce heat to 350°F; bake for 1 hour more, basting with yogurt.
